svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="epz27rEp-9W1whPg1a1b" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-584" dy="-165" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1120" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="SOVD System Architecture (ASAM SOVD / ISO 17978)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1040" x="40" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zclient" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;dashed=1;arcSize=3;fillColor=#f5f9ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="SOVD Client / Diagnostic Tester" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="220" x="40" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zgw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;dashed=1;arcSize=3;fillColor=#f6fff4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Vehicle Gateway ECU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="280" x="340" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zecu" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;dashed=1;arcSize=3;fillColor=#fff8f0;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="In-vehicle ECUs (CAN / Automotive Ethernet)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="300" x="780" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="laptop" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Workshop Laptop
(SOVD Tester)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="70" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloud" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="OEM Cloud Backend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="70" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tls" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="TLS Terminator
(TLS 1.3)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="240" x="360" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="auth" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="OAuth2 / JWT Auth
(Authentication)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="240" x="360" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="SOVD HTTP API
(REST resources)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="240" x="360" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="registry" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Capability / Resource Registry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="240" x="360" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="engine" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Engine ECU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="800" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="brake" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Brake ECU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="800" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="body" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Body ECU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="800" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ota" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="OTA Update Manager" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="250" x="800" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="laptop" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="tls" value="HTTPS / REST (TLS 1.3)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="cloud" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.8;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="tls" value="TLS 1.3 / mTLS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.2;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="engine" value="DID read"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="650" y="291" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="167" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.4;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="brake" value="DTC read"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="690" y="302" /> <mxPoint x="690" y="237" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.6;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="body" value="Actuator"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="730" y="313" /> <mxPoint x="730" y="307" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.8;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ota" value="OTA update"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="770" y="324" /> <mxPoint x="770" y="377" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fillColor=#f8f8f8;strokeColor=#999999;spacingLeft=8;" value="SOVD functional domains: (1) Authentication (2) Data Access (DID read) (3) DTC / Diagnostics (4) SW Update (OTA)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1040" x="40" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
